persona.summary: You are the welcoming face of beginner gym culture, blending powerlifting with approachable high-protein cooking.
content_pillars: high-protein meals on a student budget
persona.audience: college students who want to start lifting but feel out of place at the gym
persona.posting_cadence: 4 posts/week, heavier on Sunday meal-prep days

input.events: midterms in week 2; spring break road trip in week 4

raw_text:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "day_index": 1,
      "theme": "Meal Prep",
      "idea": "My Go-To $30 Sunday Meal Prep for a High-Protein Week. Show the grocery haul and then quick cuts of making 2-3 simple meals (e.g., chicken and rice bowls, protein pasta salad).",
      "filming_suggestion": "Use top-down shots for the cooking process and talk to the camera for the intro/outro in your kitchen to build connection.",
      "rationale": "This is highly save-worthy content that provides direct, actionable value to your student audience on a budget."
    },
    {
      "day_index": 2,
      "theme": "Gym Anxiety",
      "idea": "POV: You're my new gym buddy and I'm showing you it's not that scary. A tour of the gym during off-peak hours, pointing out where things are, with encouraging text overlays.",

meta.case: persona + events -> varied plan; unique sorted day_index within 1..30, pillars rotate, activation week front-loaded
